adaptivehorror.disclaimer.title: Before You Continue
adaptivehorror.disclaimer.body:
This mod is a work of fiction designed to create a horror experience.

§f• It is NOT malware.
• It does NOT intentionally damage your files.
• It makes NO permanent changes to your system.
• It uses only permitted, in-game functionality.

Some effects may be disturbing. Every feature can be disabled in the configuration file.
